items.summary: Onchain AI agents went from 337 in January to 330,000+ today, and 3 in 5 of them run on BNB Chain, more than every other network combined. This piece maps the four things an agent economy needs, identity, capability, payment, and accountability, against what is live on BNB Chain right now.

items.title: Bnb chain h2 2026 tech roadmap doubling down on speed（標題由網址還原，非原文標題）
items.recency_note: ⚠️日期未知，無法判斷是否近期
items.summary:
TL;DR

 * In H1 2026, BSC cut block intervals to 450 ms, brought in-memory finality down to 650 ms, and nearly doubled benchmark throughput to ~5,200 TPS
 * The H2 objective is to double mainnet throughput again, on a stated path toward a 10x improvement across BNB Chain
 * A next-generation L1 architecture is in development on a design path toward the 1M TPS end-of-life goal

Six months ago, BNB Chain set three priorities for BSC: speed, throughput, and protocol stability. This roadmap opens
